task_completion.description: Set page size to A5 and margins to 0.5 inches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page setup dialog showing A5 size (5.83" x 8.27") and 0.5" margins, or the document ruler and page proportions visually reflecting a smaller A5 booklet with narrow margins.

task_completion.description: Center-align the main title and set font size to at least 24pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title 'The Importance of Being Earnest' at the top of the document is center-aligned and visibly much larger (24pt+) than the body text.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the four specified section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headings 'Director's Note', 'Cast of Characters', 'Act Synopsis', and 'Cast Biographies' are formatted with the 'Heading 1' style (visibly larger, bolded, or highlighted in the Styles/Navigation pane).

task_completion.description: Format the 'Cast of Characters' list into a 2-column layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list of roles and actors under 'Cast of Characters' is arranged in two vertical columns, while the text before and after this section remains in a single column.

task_completion.description: Bold the actor's name preceding the hyphen in the 'Cast Biographies' section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Cast Biographies' section, the text before the hyphen in each paragraph (the actor's name) is in bold font weight.

task_completion.description: Insert a centered page number in the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page number is visible and center-aligned at the bottom (footer) of the document pages.
The application title bar or a 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'formatted_playbill.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processor GUI with toolbars and menus, not just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actively applied formatting rather than opening a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like selecting text, opening formatting dialogs, or adjusting layout settings.

integrity.description: The agent formatted the existing text rather than manually typing out the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document content matches the original raw text, and there is no evidence of the agent typing the entire document from scratch in a new window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is /home/ga/Documents/raw_playbill.docx and the expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/formatted_playbill.docx. The page size must be A5 (5.83 inches wide by 8.27 inches tall) with 0.5-inch margins. The required Heading 1 sections are 'Director's Note', 'Cast of Characters', 'Act Synopsis', and 'Cast Biographies'.
